title: Assembly Line
description: Assembly Line is a mod that focuses on automation of factory-like environments in feel with the old voltz mod
body: **As of the 1st of June 2025, all future updates for ampz mods will require Voltaic API, and not Electrodynamics, in order to function. This update affects all the mods and brings world breaking changes, which are written in the changelogs. Note that this should however not corrupt your world. If you have such issues reach out on our discord channel!** Assembly Lines intends to increase the efficiency of factories or production lines. It makes the game more realistic by providing useful machines that facilitate the transfer and storage of items. It is based upon the old Voltz mod and therefore follows the same base systems. **This project is based upon [Voltaic](https://modrinth.com/project/voltaic) and requires this mod to run.** **Join us on discord:** ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/569969909380153345.svg?label=Join%20us%20on%20Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=FFFFFF&style=flat-square) [Click here](https://discord.gg/bzH7CdQWRb) **You should also check out my new Patreon:** [![](https://img.shields.io/endpoint.svg?url=https://shieldsio-patreon.vercel.app/api?username=aurilisdev&type=patrons&style=for-the-badge)](https://www.patreon.com/aurilisdev) **You should also check out our official modpack here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/ampz-1-18** **It is a recreation of voltz for minecraft 1.20**  [Link to electrodynamics](https://modrinth.com/mod/electrodynamics)   ![](https://i.ibb.co/1TRxzQT/ezgif-2-1be0d4db4e71.gif)   **Permission to use in modpacks:** Yes you are allowed to do this: However, as written in the license (special permissions referring to distribution):  ``` You may only use the special permissions above, if you provide proper attribution to the Owner of this software "Sebastian Siljuholtet Johansen" (in the form of credit) and an URL to this Software�s official download page were the pack is accessed. ```
